mission: Operate BrandBuild / AI Video as the canonical product repo for the shared AI video platform while keeping unrelated BYOR-owned roofing features out of this codebase.
primary_goals: Keep apps/dashboard as the main supported product surface.
Maintain clean provider-abstraction and internal dashboard workflows.
secondary_goals: Reduce naming drift between BrandBuild and AI Video Studio where practical.
Maintain durable project memory inside the repo.
non_goals: Do not host BYOR roof-measure runtime features here.
Do not turn this repo into the sandbox/testbed when the separate sandbox already exists.
hard_rules: BrandBuild and AI Video are the same product family by user direction.
BYOR-owned roof-measure code belongs in BYOR, not in this repo.
Use .project-memory as the canonical durable memory location for this repo.
strong_preferences: Keep forbidden-reference checks product-neutral and focused on boundary enforcement.
Prefer promoting stable work here from the sandbox instead of duplicating long-term effort.
optional_preferences: Reconcile naming drift over time so package identity and repo marketing language align better.
business_constraints: This is the canonical repo for the BrandBuild / AI Video product family.
technical_constraints: apps/dashboard remains the maintained product surface.
Typecheck should keep passing after cleanup batches.
compliance_notes: Keep provider logic server-side and behind internal adapters as described in repo docs.
definitions_of_done: No BYOR-owned roofing features remain in the runtime source tree.
